plan_summary.plan_name: White House East Wing Casino (Pioneer's Gauntlet)
plan_summary.primary_goal: Launch Phase 1 container casino, prove 60-90 days continuous profitability to unlock 75% sponsor capital, fund permanent Phase 2 build.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests Phase 1 daily revenue, NOI, sponsor profitability gate margin, sponsor capital release, contingency remediation burn capacity, and AML-shock NOI resilience. Existential regulatory and AML-licensing gates are out-of-model and tracked as unmodelled_gates.

key_values.label: Total sponsor budget
key_values.comment: Total CapEx envelope committed by sponsors; ceiling on construction and contingency draws.
key_values.source_text: Total construction budget envelope is 600 Million USD from sponsors

key_values.label: Ring-fenced political reversal contingency
key_values.comment: 15% of $600M segregated escrow for forced site remediation if political reversal mandate is declared.
key_values.source_text: $90M ring-fenced for immediate political reversal contingency (15% of $600M)

key_values.label: Sponsor capital release fraction tied to Phase 1
key_values.comment: 75% of total sponsor capital is conditional on the Phase 1 profitability gate clearing.
key_values.source_text: Sponsor funding release is tied 75% to temporary casino profitability milestones

key_values.label: Required daily NOI for sponsor unlock
key_values.comment: Sponsor-contracted minimum Net Operating Income per operational day during the continuous-profit window.
key_values.source_text: Target NOI per day for funding unlock: $50,000 USD

key_values.label: Sponsor profitability gate window
key_values.comment: Sponsor-contract requires 90 consecutive days of profitable operation to trigger capital release.
key_values.source_text: Sponsor capital release threshold: 90 days of continuous profitable operation

key_values.label: Casino guest capacity ceiling
key_values.comment: Hard cap on simultaneous patrons; the denominator for revenue, utilization, and high-roller mix.

key_values.label: High-roller share of guest capacity
key_values.comment: 60/40 split prioritizing high-roller patrons; AML cap on bank-settled spend impacts this segment disproportionately.
key_values.source_text: Guest capacity split prioritizes high-roller patrons at 60%

key_values.label: Phase 1 relocation operational blackout
key_values.comment: Forced 7-day no-revenue interval during Phase 1-to-Phase 2 container relocation; eats into the sponsor gate window.
key_values.source_text: Phase 1 relocation requires a 7-day operational blackout

derived_questions.question: Does the sponsor-contracted profitability window still clear after absorbing the mandated relocation blackout?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Threshold-friendly margin: achieved profitable-operation days (window minus blackout) minus the contractually required window. Positive means the gate clears at >= 0; negative quantifies the days short of the sponsor's 90-day continuous-profit requirement, which would fail the capital release gate regardless of daily NOI.

derived_questions.question: After the AML bank-settlement spend reduction on the high-roller segment, does daily NOI still clear the $50k sponsor threshold?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: AML compliance forces bank-settled markers, projected to cut top-tier spend; this stress-tests the sponsor gate under that shock.

derived_questions.question: What share of expected daily revenue comes from the high-roller segment, given the 60/40 capacity prioritization?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Quantifies the revenue concentration on the AML-exposed segment so coupling to the AML shock can be reasoned about.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Average daily revenue per guest
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Required to size Phase 1 daily revenue from capacity and utilization; not stated in the digest.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Benchmark high-end international casino daily gaming revenue per occupied seat; bound widely given diplomatic mix.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Phase 1 daily operating cost
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Subtracted from daily revenue to get NOI tested against the $50k sponsor gate.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Sum staff, microgrid energy, security, T2CA vetting, and venue lease per day; ground in container-casino opex comparables.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Expected average capacity utilization
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Scales the 999-guest ceiling to realistic average occupancy for revenue modelling.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Bound from peer 24/7 high-end venues; consider 0.3-0.7 range with seasonal/diplomatic-event spikes.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: High-roller spend reduction from bank-only settlement
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Quantifies the AML-imposed spend cap on bank-settled markers; needed for the AML-adjusted NOI stress test.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Center near the digest's stated up-to-20% cap; bound 0.05-0.30 to reflect uncertainty in actual high-roller behavior shift.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Court-imposed remediation window if political reversal occurs
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Denominator for converting the $90M contingency into a daily remediation burn capacity tested against actual remediation costs.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Use the digest's stated 90-day mandate; bound 60-120 days to reflect possible accelerated or extended court orders.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Expected Phase 1 daily revenue
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Top of the revenue chain; everything downstream — NOI, sponsor gate, AML shock — consumes this value.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Expected daily Net Operating Income
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Direct input to the sponsor-contracted $50k/day profitability gate.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Sponsor profitability trigger margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Counterparty-enforced contractual gate: positive margin means the sponsor capital release condition clears at the daily level.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Sponsor capital release on Phase 1 success
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Sizes the tranche unlocked by the sponsor contractual gate (~$450M); the financial stake in clearing the profitability trigger.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Court-mandated remediation daily burn capacity
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether the $90M escrow can fund site remediation at the pace a court-ordered political reversal would demand.

unmodelled_gates.label: GSA/DOI post-facto land-use authorization
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Construction proceeds before federal authorization for converting demolished White House East Wing land to commercial casino use; no quantitative threshold exists.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Court ruling halts the project mid-construction; sponsor tranche never releases and Phase 2 capital becomes stranded regardless of Phase 1 NOI performance.

unmodelled_gates.label: International Banking Consortium AML/KYC certification
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: All high-value markers must settle through the pre-approved consortium; without certification, the only legal settlement rail is blocked.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Loss of banking access shuts down high-roller settlement, collapsing the revenue assumption underlying the sponsor profitability gate.

unmodelled_gates.label: Conditional High-Security Gaming Operation License
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Phase 1 operations are conditional on this Phase-1 license; the model treats it as granted but cannot probabilistically test issuance.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Phase 1 cannot open; the 90-day continuous-profit clock never starts and the sponsor capital gate cannot be reached.

unmodelled_gates.label: Diplomatic acceptance of Tier 2 Commercial Access vetting
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Revenue concentration on diplomatic high-rollers depends on world-leader delegations accepting a commercial-grade (non-sovereign) vetting tier.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Patron boycott collapses the 60/40 high-roller mix and the revenue assumptions underlying the sponsor gate.
